channel.title: Lateral Movement on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Lateral Movement on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: Splunk-Poisoned PyTorch
item.description: An attacker gained initial access to the unucorb domain via a tampered Python dependency during model training. The compromised script deployed a fileless Cobalt Strike beacon, enabling extensive reconnaissance, credential theft via leftover sysprep files, and lateral movement using RDP. Ultimately, the attacker deployed Lynx ransomware across critical infrastructure servers.
